# Launch Schedule and Objectives

## Mission Objective

The mission objective is to achieve stable levitation for a period of at least 24 hours under varying environmental conditions.

## Timeline

The launch date is June 15th, 2026. All systems must be verified by June 1st.

## Technical Specifications

- Power source: Fusion Battery
- Control System: AI-driven stability matrix
- Cooling: Liquid Nitrogen Loop

```code
function initializeLevitation() {
  console.log("Achieving stable levitation...");
}
```

- [x] Propulsion tests
- [ ] Atmospheric entry simulation
